title: quercus lyrata
intro: Quercus lyrata, also known as the Overcup Oak, is a deciduous tree species native to the southeastern United States. The bark of the Overcup Oak has been used in traditional medicine for its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Quercus lyrata have been found to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Quercus lyrata include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
